title: Narrow AI Path
description: Build fluency in Narrow AI inside AI Types by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Artificial Narrow Intelligence (ANI)
steps.summary: ** Artificial Narrow Intelligence (ANI) belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Narrow AI. It sits inside AI Types / Narrow AI. Start after Artificial Narrow Intelligence.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Narrow AI
steps.summary: Narrow AI belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Narrow AI. It sits inside AI Types / Narrow AI. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture. It opens into AI Narrow vs. AI General and Narrow AI vs. General AI.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Autonomous Evaluation Agents

steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Autonomous Agents
steps.summary: Autonomous Agents belongs to the AI Types area of AI/ML, within Narrow AI. It sits inside AI Types / Narrow AI. Compare it with Autonomous Evaluation Agents and Decentralized Autonomous Agents (DAAs). It opens into Autonomous Evaluation Agents and Autonomous Goal-Setting Agents.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
